message:
Add additional tests and code quality improvements

Expands test coverage in content-extractor and service metrics, applies
clippy lint suppressions, and refines formatting in core-types config.

Changes
-------
**content-extractor (ultrasearch/crates/content-extractor/src/lib.rs)**

+ Test: simple_extractor_bytes_processed_matches_meta
  Verifies that ExtractedContent.bytes_processed accurately reflects the
  number of bytes read from disk for a small text file.

  ```rust
  std::fs::write(&path, b"abc").unwrap();
  // ...
  let out = simple.extract(&ctx, DocKey::from_parts(1, 1)).unwrap();
  assert_eq!(out.bytes_processed, 3);
  assert!(!out.truncated);
  assert_eq!(out.text, "abc");
  ```

  Ensures that telemetry reporting accurately captures I/O metrics.

**service/metrics (ultrasearch/crates/service/src/metrics.rs)**

+ Test: reset_worker_failures_resets_counter
  Validates that reset_worker_failures() clears the failure counter back
  to zero after threshold breaches.

  ```rust
  metrics.record_worker_failure();
  assert!(metrics.worker_failures.get() > 0);
  metrics.reset_worker_failures();
  assert_eq!(metrics.worker_failures.get(), 0);
  ```

  Important for recovery logic: after spawning fresh worker, service can
  reset failure count to avoid unnecessary restarts.

**core-types/config (ultrasearch/crates/core-types/src/config/mod.rs)**

+ #[allow(clippy::derivable_impls)] on Default impls
  Suppresses clippy::derivable_impls for AppConfig and FeaturesSection.

  Rationale:
  - Default impls call default helper functions (default_data_dir, etc.)
  - Explicit Default gives better documentation and allows future non-trivial
    initialization (e.g., environment variable fallbacks)
  - Clippy warning is acknowledged but design choice is intentional

~ default_usn_chunk_bytes() formatting
  ```rust
  fn default_usn_chunk_bytes() -> u64 {
      1_048_576  // was: 1 * 1024 * 1024
  }
  ```
  Literal constant is clearer than arithmetic (no runtime cost either way).

~ Test formatting
  Multi-line formatting for long assertions in placeholder tests:
  ```rust
  assert!(cfg
      .paths
      .meta_index
      .starts_with("X:/UltraSearch/index/meta"));
  ```

Rationale
---------
bytes_processed test ensures telemetry dashboards (Grafana, etc.) can
accurately track extraction throughput in bytes/sec.

reset_worker_failures test documents recovery semantics: failure counter
is not sticky across worker restarts.

Clippy suppressions document intentional deviation from default derive
rules, preventing future contributor churn on "obvious" clippy fixes.

1_048_576 literal improves readability in contexts where byte sizes are
compared (e.g., "why is chunk size exactly 1 MiB?").

Related
-------
- §c00.5.2 extractor telemetry design
- §c00.8.3 metrics recording and reset semantics
- §c00.9.1 config file documentation (pending)
- PLAN progress log (RedSnow crate-local tests)
